name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentations that actually look like a human made them.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools produce cookie-cutter slides that undermine credibility and brand identity. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between AI speed and design quality, giving teams polished, visually distinctive decks without manual design effort.
useCases: Creating client-facing pitch decks that avoid the generic AI aesthetic
Producing internal business presentations at speed without sacrificing visual quality
Building marketing or product launch slide decks with consistent branding
Rapidly iterating on presentation drafts for executive or investor reviews
